title: Habit editor modal: create/edit form + validation

task.description: Add a modal screen for creating and editing a habit with name, icon, frequency type, weekly target validation (1–7), and optional category selection. Use KeyboardAvoidingView so the Save button remains tappable with keyboard open.
acceptance_criteria: Screen root uses `SafeAreaView` and form is wrapped in `KeyboardAvoidingView` with `behavior` conditional on `Platform.OS`
Creating a daily habit with name length 1–50 and icon length 1–20 saves a habit with `frequencyType="daily"`, `weeklyTarget=null`, `isArchived=false` and returns to previous screen
Selecting weekly frequency requires an integer weeklyTarget 1..7; when valid, habit is saved with `frequencyType="weekly"` and `weeklyTarget` set
If weeklyTarget is empty or outside 1..7, Save does not call any repo write and an inline error text is shown
When editing with an `id` param, the form loads existing values and Save calls `updateHabit()`; on success it navigates back

definition_of_done: Form is usable on iOS/Android with keyboard open
ui_requirements: Modal layout: title (New Habit/Edit Habit), Input for name, icon picker (simple Input + quick emoji buttons), segmented buttons for daily/weekly, conditional numeric Input for weekly target, category selector list (nullable), Save/Cancel buttons fixed at bottom with keyboard avoiding.
